mapper.select: SELECT o.*, p.id as ord_product_id, p.title as ord_product_title, p.status as ord_product_status, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as firstImageUrl, b.id as ord_buyer_id, b.name as ord_buyer_name, b.student_id as ord_buyer_student_id, b.phone as ord_buyer_phone, b.avatar as ord_buyer_avatar, s.id as ord_seller_id, s.name as ord_seller_name, s.student_id as ord_seller_student_id, s.phone as ord_seller_phone, s.avatar as ord_seller_avatar FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN `user` b ON o.buyer_id = b.id LEFT JOIN `user` s ON o.seller_id = s.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT o.*, p.id as ord_product_id, p.title as ord_product_title, p.status as ord_product_status, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as firstImageUrl FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC

SELECT o.*, p.id as ord_product_id, p.title as ord_product_title, p.status as ord_product_status, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as firstImageUrl FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status IN (0, 1) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (product_id, buyer_id, seller_id, quantity, price, total_price, status, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{productId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{totalPrice}, 0, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW()
, completed_at = NOW()
, completed_at = NULL
WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW()
, completed_at = NOW()
, completed_at = NULL
WHERE id = #{id}
